rows.question: What is document/file 'Student CSV/XLSX Template' used for?
rows.answer: Columns: student_name, grade, section, school_roll_number, consent_obtained; examples included.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document student_csv_template in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=csv,xlsx.
rows.test_instruction: Verify student_csv_template appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for student_csv_template.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only school_coordinator can create student_csv_template.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for student_csv_template: csv,xlsx.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for student_csv_template.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for student_csv_template: public_or_school_specific; Template download available only when participation approved; school-specific download logged if personalised.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies student_csv_template cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.answer: Template download available only when participation approved; school-specific download logged if personalised.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for student_csv_template: Template download available only when participation approved; school-specific download logged if personalised.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for student_csv_template.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Student Upload File' used for?
rows.answer: Uploaded bulk student list for parsing and validation.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document student_upload_file in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded, formats=csv,xlsx.
rows.test_instruction: Verify student_upload_file appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Student Upload File'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for student_upload_file.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only school_coordinator can create student_upload_file.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Student Upload File'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for student_upload_file: csv,xlsx.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for student_upload_file.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Student Upload File'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for student_upload_file: private; Private file scoped to school_id; virus/type/size checks; no public URL.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies student_upload_file cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Student Upload File'?
rows.answer: Private file scoped to school_id; virus/type/size checks; no public URL.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for student_upload_file: Private file scoped to school_id; virus/type/size checks; no public URL.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for student_upload_file.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Student Validation Report' used for?
rows.answer: Report of valid rows, invalid rows, duplicate warnings, missing fields, consent errors.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document student_validation_report in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=csv,xlsx,pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Verify student_validation_report appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Student Validation Report'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for student_validation_report.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only system can create student_validation_report.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Student Validation Report'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for student_validation_report: csv,xlsx,pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for student_validation_report.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Student Validation Report'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for student_validation_report: private; Visible only to own school and authorised staff.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies student_validation_report cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Student Validation Report'?
rows.answer: Visible only to own school and authorised staff.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for student_validation_report: Visible only to own school and authorised staff.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for student_validation_report.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Parent Consent Declaration' used for?
rows.answer: School declaration confirming parent consent has been obtained for submitted students.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document parent_consent_declaration in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded_or_generated, formats=pdf,jpg,png.
rows.test_instruction: Verify parent_consent_declaration appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Parent Consent Declaration'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for parent_consent_declaration.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only school_coordinator,school_principal can create parent_consent_declaration.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Parent Consent Declaration'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for parent_consent_declaration: pdf,jpg,png.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for parent_consent_declaration.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Parent Consent Declaration'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for parent_consent_declaration: private; Required before finalising student count; private and retained by policy.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies parent_consent_declaration cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Parent Consent Declaration'?
rows.answer: Required before finalising student count; private and retained by policy.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for parent_consent_declaration: Required before finalising student count; private and retained by policy.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for parent_consent_declaration.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Attendance Sheet' used for?
rows.answer: Candidate attendance list for invigilator/school use.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document attendance_sheet in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=pdf,csv.
rows.test_instruction: Verify attendance_sheet appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Attendance Sheet'?

rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for attendance_sheet.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Attendance Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for attendance_sheet: private; Private own-school only; downloaded with exam pack.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies attendance_sheet cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Attendance Sheet'?
rows.answer: Private own-school only; downloaded with exam pack.

rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for attendance_sheet.
